caribbean.headline: Caribbean Rain Hits Cartagena
caribbean.paragraph: Cartagena is experiencing heavy rain with a 99% probability of precipitation, accompanied by moderate winds of 13 kt and wave heights of 2.4 ft. Nassau is also seeing notable weather conditions, with winds reaching 15 kt, although the primary concern remains the significant rainfall in Cartagena.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing west winds of 19 kt with significant wave heights reaching 7.9 ft, while Haifa remains calm with no wind. I expect rough seas to impact maritime operations near Cadiz, particularly with a 90% chance of rain in the area.
